arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca gets green light for January transfer as Chelsea exit route emerges
arts.sum: The 21-year-old, who incidentally spent part of last season on loan with Enzo Maresca at Leicester City, has yet to feature for Chelsea in the Premier League this season. The report adds that Monza are hoping to have Casedei registered as soon as the window opens on January 2 - so that he can play against Cagliari three days later.

arts.ttl: “Outstanding player” – Director and manager on potentially signing Chelsea star in January
arts.sum: Bayern Munich sporting director Max Eberl has ruled out signing Chelsea winger Mykhailo Mudryk in the winter market. On Tuesday, the Bavarian club sealed a 5-1 win over Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League. After the tie, Eberl spoke to the local reporters and his comments are relayed by Bild. arts.ttl: “Special” Arsenal wonderkid looks like a missed transfer opportunity by Chelsea
arts.sum: Arsenal youngster Myles Lewis-Skelly has made quite an impression since coming into Mikel Arteta’s first-team this season. The versatile teenager, who can play left-back or midfield and who only recently turned 18, really caught the eye for the Gunners yesterday in their 3-0 Champions League win over Monaco.
